user.title: GWM ORA add-on
user.description: Connect to a running GWM ORA add-on. This is mostly useful for development or non-Supervisor installs.

data_description.host: Internal add-on hostname or development host.
data_description.port: Add-on API port. The packaged add-on uses 8099.
data_description.token: Generated add-on API token. GWM account credentials never go here.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure GWM ORA add-on
reconfigure.description: Update the add-on API connection used by this integration. For normal Home Assistant add-on installs, restarting the add-on should rediscover and update these values automatically.

data_description.host: Internal add-on hostname or development host.
data_description.port: Add-on API port. The packaged add-on uses 8099.
data_description.token: Generated add-on API token. GWM account credentials never go here.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect GWM ORA add-on
reauth_confirm.description: The add-on rejected the stored API token. Restart the add-on first; if this is a development install, enter the updated host, port, and token.

data_description.host: Internal add-on hostname or development host.
data_description.port: Add-on API port. The packaged add-on uses 8099.
data_description.token: Generated add-on API token. GWM account credentials never go here.

hassio_confirm.title: GWM ORA add-on discovered
hassio_confirm.description: Set up the discovered GWM ORA add-on at {host}.

error.invalid_auth: The add-on API token was rejected.

addon_auth_failed.message: The GWM ORA add-on rejected the stored API token.

addon_request_failed.message: The GWM ORA add-on could not complete the request.

addon_unavailable.message: The GWM ORA add-on is not reachable.

remote_command_unavailable.message: Remote commands are unavailable. Enable remote commands and configure the security PIN in the add-on.

addon_auth_failed.title: GWM ORA add-on authentication failed
addon_auth_failed.description: The integration can reach the GWM ORA add-on, but the add-on rejected the stored API token. Restart the add-on first so Supervisor can rediscover it. For development or non-Supervisor installs, use Reconfigure and enter the current add-on API token.
